coming_soon.ht: Byento, nou pral pibliye yon pi bon vèsyon
coming_soon.en: Coming soon, we will release a better version

must_know_coming_soon.ht: Si w ap li mesaj sa a, tanpri konnen kòmantè sou vèsè jounen yo pa disponib pou kounye a.
must_know_coming_soon.en: If you see this message, daily verse comments are temporarily unavailable.

things_you_should_know.ht: Pwen 💰 yo ka itilize pou achte bagay nan app nan tan kap vini.
things_you_should_know.en: Tokens can be used to unlock things in the app in the future.

reflection_text.ht: Koute yon ti refleksyon odyo chak semèn sou vèsè jounen an avèk pastè Saint Jean.
reflection_text.en: Listen to a short weekly audio reflection on the verse of the day with Pastor Saint Jean.

message.ht: Desann nouvo vèsyon Bib Kreyol la
message.en: Bib Kreyol latest version is here

message.ht: Kemi Jah-El Feat. Bayo-: Non Jamais Tout Seul (Official Cover)
message.en: Kemi Jah-El Feat. Bayo-: Non Jamais Tout Seul (Official Cover)

name.ht: Bolivido LLC kontinye sipòte Bib Kreyol depi 2025.
name.en: Bolivido LLC has supported Bib Kreyol since 2025.
